changes.summary: Added ForwardPublicationUseCase (BC-03) with proposeForward() and rejectForward(): validation, inv-01 forward_proposal global wallet debit, updateForwardProposal/clearForwardProposal, and lead notifications. Exposes createForwardPublicationUseCase factory.

Added AcceptForwardPublicationUseCase (BC-03) with execute(): lead/superadmin forward or accept pending proposal, create target publication copy, inv-03 vote merit transfer and soft-delete original only when forwardRule=project, otherwise markAsForwarded (standard). Exposes createAcceptForwardPublicationUseCase factory.
publications.proposeForward, publications.forward, and publications.rejectForward delegate to use cases; removed inline forward orchestration (~300 lines).

verification.tsc_changed_files: no errors filtered for changed paths

notes: AcceptForwardPublicationUseCase preserves existing behavior: standard mode keeps original and sets forwardStatus=forwarded; project mode retargets votes, recalculates score/lifetimeCredits, and soft-deletes the source publication.
